name: Beef with Green Peppers
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Corn starch, dissolved in 1/3 cup Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice beef into thin bite-size pieces across the grain. Marinate beef in soya sauce, wine, and salt. Prepare and shred green peppers.
2. Heat oil in a wok to smoking point. Quickly stir fry beef for no more than 3 minutes. Remove beef to a platter and set aside.
3. Add shredded green peppers and 4 tablespoons water to the wok. Stir fry for about 3 minutes, uncovered.
4. Return beef to the wok. Stir in the corn starch solution. Mix everything together. The gravy should be on the thin side. Transfer to a platter.
NOTE: If desired, 2 cloves of garlic could be minced and stir-fried with the beef for a zesty flavor.
